# Dor Tzabari

> Business Development Director with 8+ years experience building and driving GTM strategies in early-stage startups.

## About

Dor Tzabari builds at the intersection of AI and product. He is interested in how language models change the way software gets made, used, and understood.

A GTM operator who builds from scratch. Over 8+ years he has taken products from early traction to enterprise adoption: qualified pipeline, paid POCs, and long-term commercial partnerships across the US, EMEA, and APAC.

Former IDF Captain (Yahalom — Combat Engineering Unit for Special Operations).

Currently focused on creating a startup with massive real-world impact, using AI at the edge of what's possible.

## Experience

### Business Development Director — DriveU.auto (2020–Present)
Provider of teleoperation and autonomy for vehicles, deployed across global autonomous fleets.
- Built and executed global GTM strategy across US, EMEA, and APAC; scaled pipeline to $5M+ in potential ACV
- Led end-to-end sales cycles: 10 paid POCs and 4 multi-year commercial agreements ($300K–$1.5M)
- Designed OpenClaw, a custom AI outbound agent automating lead enrichment and prospecting at scale
- Built proprietary account intelligence database of 600+ organizations
- Cultivated C-level relationships at CES, MWC, Manifest

### Co-Founder & CEO — Greentech (2017–2020)
Smart waste management platform; deployed with Tel Aviv Municipality.
- Full company buildout from founding through market entry
- Flagship deployment with Tel Aviv Municipality on Rothschild Boulevard
- Negotiated sole-source vendor designation, eliminating competitive tender
- Raised $100K in pre-seed funding

## Military

Officer (Captain), Yahalom — IDF Combat Engineering Unit for Special Operations (2011–2016)
- Commanded a team of 20 soldiers through complex, high-stakes operations
- Founded and led a technological R&D unit

## Education

Computer Science — The Open University of Israel

## Skills

Business: GTM Strategy, Enterprise Sales, Strategic Alliances, C-Level Engagement, Pipeline Architecture, Product-Market Fit, Fundraising, Channel Development
Technical: AI Sales Automation, LLM Research & Enrichment, Prompt Engineering, Sales Enablement Automation
Tools: HubSpot, Salesforce, Apollo, LinkedIn Sales Navigator, JIRA, Claude Code, ChatGPT, Perplexity
